name: Finance, Cash & Accounting Controls

scenarios.title: Create a durable finance cash control packet
steps: Open the Sprint 12 Finance, Cash & Accounting Controls workspace.

Review finance packets, revenue operations packets, commercial controls, invoice intakes, shipment financial snapshots, shipment cost lines, WMS billing invoice runs, quotes, sales orders, and action queue evidence.
expected: A durable AssistantFinanceCashControlPacket row is created with source summary, cash posture, receivables, payables, accounting handoff, margin leakage, warehouse billing, close controls, response plan, rollback plan, and leadership summary JSON.
An AssistantAuditEvent records that packet creation is evidence-only.
No invoice approval, journal posting, accounting export, vendor payment, customer billing, WMS billing post, order/quote change, period close, or finance record mutation happens automatically.

scenarios.title: Queue controller review
steps: Add an optional controller review note to a draft Sprint 12 packet.
expected: The packet moves to CONTROLLER_REVIEW_QUEUED and stores actionQueueItemId.
An AssistantActionQueueItem is created for finance_cash_controller_review with the packet URL and finance control evidence.

The queued review is separate from financial execution; the assistant does not post journals, export accounting files, pay vendors, bill customers, approve invoices, close periods, or change billing runs automatically.

scenarios.title: Approve reviewed finance controls
steps: Review cash posture, receivables, payables, accounting handoff, margin leakage, WMS billing, close-control gaps, and rollback plan.
expected: The packet status becomes APPROVED with approvedAt, approvedByUserId, and approvalNote.
An AssistantAuditEvent records approval and reiterates the no-silent-finance-mutation guardrail.
Approval records controller evidence only; actual finance, accounting, billing, payment, export, or period-close execution requires separate downstream approved workflows.

guardrails: No invoice is approved, rejected, paid, disputed, exported, or marked for accounting automatically.
No journal entry, accrual, ledger export, ERP export, accounting packet, or period close is created or posted automatically.
No WMS billing invoice run is posted, voided, edited, exported, or sent automatically.
No customer invoice, credit, collection action, customer communication, or receivable status is created or changed automatically.
No vendor payment, payable status, shipment cost line, margin value, quote, sales order, pricing snapshot, tariff, or finance record is mutated automatically.
